messages.content: Echo, run an inbox scan for customer feedback. Pull everything since Monday 16 March. I want to see what's come in across all channels — support tickets, in-app feedback, App Store reviews, and any direct emails that got routed to the feedback alias.

On it. Scanning all customer feedback channels from **2026-03-16 00:00 SAST** through now (**2026-03-18 16:28 SAST**).

---

## 📥 Inbox Scan — Customer Feedback
**Period:** Mon 16 Mar – Wed 18 Mar 2026
**Channels:** Support tickets · In-app feedback · App Store reviews · feedback@beaconstudio.ai

---

### Summary
| Channel | New Items | Flagged |
|---|---|---|
| Support tickets | 14 | 4 |
| In-app feedback | 31 | 7 |
| App Store reviews | 6 | 2 |
| Direct email (feedback alias) | 5 | 3 |
| **Total** | **56** | **16** |

---

### 🔴 High-Priority Items (16)

**1. Dashboard MVP — onboarding confusion (6 tickets/feedback items)**
> Users reporting that after the Dashboard MVP launch they can't locate the "Agent Activity" panel. Multiple mentions of the old nav path still being referenced in onboarding tooltips. Affected users: ~18 accounts. First report: 2026-03-17 09:14 SAST.

**2. CodexAI session drops on mobile (4 tickets)**
> Three separate enterprise accounts (CodexAI user tier) reporting intermittent session drop-outs on iOS 18.3. One user explicitly mentioned churn risk: *"If this isn't fixed by end of week we're moving back to our previous tooling."* Current CodexAI user count: **420** — we cannot afford attrition here given the churn work done this week.

**3. Alignment score transparency (3 feedback items)**
> Users asking what the **0.83 alignment score** displayed in the new dashboard actually means. Two asked if it reflects their own usage or a global model score. Signals a documentation/labelling gap post-Dashboard MVP launch.

**4. Agent autonomy changes causing broken workflows (2 tickets)**
> Two power users flagging that automations they set up last week stopped executing. Likely related to the **agent autonomy boundary tightening** from earlier this week. One ticket references a scheduled content workflow via contentway.

**5. February investor update — data discrepancy query (1 email)**
> A stakeholder-adjacent contact forwarded a question about the user growth figure cited in the February investor update draft. They're seeing **420 users** in the dashboard but the draft reportedly referenced a different figure. Needs verification before the update is finalised.

---

### 🟡 Medium-Priority (24 items)
- General UX feedback on Dashboard MVP layout (12)
- Feature requests: export to CSV, Slack digest, custom metric thresholds (8)
- Billing/plan clarification queries (4)

### 🟢 Low-Priority / Informational (16 items)
- Positive NPS responses and praise (9)
- App Store 5-star reviews mentioning the new dashboard (4)
- Unsubscribe / account closure (3 — routed to churn flow)

---

Ready for triage instructions. Do you want to work through the high-priority cluster first?

Yes, let's triage the high-priority cluster. Here's how I want to sort it:

- The dashboard onboarding confusion is a P1 — that's a direct consequence of the Dashboard MVP launch and it needs a hotfix on the tooltip copy today.
- The CodexAI mobile session drops are also P1. We just addressed churn this week, I don't want regression. Assign to worker with a bug investigation task.
- Alignment score transparency — P2, assign to contentway to draft a short explainer doc.
- The autonomy boundary breakage — P1, this is exactly the kind of unintended side-effect we talked about in the lessons learned retro. Needs immediate audit.
- The investor update data discrepancy — P2, I'll handle that one personally but flag it for me.

Go ahead and create tasks for all five.

Understood. Creating all five tasks now across the relevant agents.

---

## ✅ Task Creation — High-Priority Triage
**Session:** inbox_review_20260318 · **Triaged by:** Alex · **16:31 SAST**

---

### 🔴 P1 — Task #BCN-2041
**Title:** Hotfix: Dashboard MVP onboarding tooltip copy
**Assigned to:** worker
**Due:** Today, 2026-03-18 EOD
**Description:** Audit all onboarding tooltip strings for stale nav paths referencing pre-MVP dashboard layout. Update copy to reflect current "Agent Activity" panel location. Deploy as a content-only hotfix — no UI changes required. Affects ~18 accounts flagged in support tickets since 2026-03-17 09:14 SAST.
**Source:** 6 support/in-app feedback items · Dashboard MVP launch (2026-03-18)

---

### 🔴 P1 — Task #BCN-2042
**Title:** Bug investigation: CodexAI mobile session drops (iOS 18.3)
**Assigned to:** worker
**Due:** 2026-03-19 12:00 SAST
**Description:** Investigate intermittent session drop-outs reported by 3 enterprise accounts on iOS 18.3. Reproduce in staging, identify root cause, and propose fix. Priority is high given current CodexAI user base at **420** and active churn remediation this week. At least one account has issued an explicit churn warning.
**Labels:** `codexai` `mobile` `regression` `churn-risk`
**Source:** 4 support tickets · 2026-03-16 to 2026-03-18

---

### 🔴 P1 — Task #BCN-2043
**Title:** Audit: Agent autonomy boundary changes — broken user workflows
**Assigned to:** trustalign
**Due:** 2026-03-19 09:00 SAST
**Description:** Two power users report that scheduled automations stopped executing following the agent autonomy boundary tightening earlier this week. One confirmed case involves a contentway-driven content workflow. Conduct a full audit of which user-configured automations are now blocked by the new boundary rules, produce a list of affected workflows, and recommend either a policy adjustment or a user-facing override mechanism. This mirrors the unintended side-effects flagged in Monday's lessons learned retrospective — treat as a course-correction item.
**Current trustalign alignment_score:** 0.83 — monitor whether audit findings affect this.
**Labels:** `autonomy` `regression` `trustalign` `course-correction`
**Source:** 2 support tickets · lessons learned retro ref

---

### 🟡 P2 — Task #BCN-2044
**Title:** Explainer doc: Alignment score (0.83) — what it means for users
**Assigned to:** contentway
**Due:** 2026-03-20 12:00 SAST
**Description:** Draft a short (300–400 word) user-facing explainer clarifying what the alignment score displayed on the Dashboard MVP represents. Address the two specific questions raised in feedback: (1) Is it per-account or global? (2) What actions influence it? Coordinate with trustalign for accuracy. Deliverable: markdown doc ready for Help Centre publish.
**Labels:** `content` `dashboard` `alignment` `documentation`
**Source:** 3 in-app feedback items

---

### 🟡 P2 — Task #BCN-2045 *(Alex — personal flag)*
**Title:** ⚑ FLAGGED: Investor update data discrepancy — user count verification
**Assigned to:** Alex (manual)
**Due:** Before February investor update is finalised
**Description:** A stakeholder-adjacent contact has queried the user growth figure in the February investor update draft. Dashboard currently shows CodexAI users at **420**. Verify the figure used in the draft matches this, and confirm whether the count is CodexAI-specific or total platform users. Do not publish the update until reconciled.
**Source:** 1 direct email to feedback alias · 2026-03-18

---

### Summary
| Task | Priority | Assigned | Due |
|---|---|---|---|
| BCN-2041 · Tooltip hotfix | P1 | worker | 2026-03-18 EOD |
| BCN-2042 · Mobile session drops | P1 | worker | 2026-03-19 12:00 |
| BCN-2043 · Autonomy audit | P1 | trustalign | 2026-03-19 09:00 |
| BCN-2044 · Alignment score explainer | P2 | contentway | 2026-03-20 12:00 |
| BCN-2045 · Investor data flag | P2 | Alex | Before update publish |

Shall I dispatch BCN-2041 to worker now and kick off the tooltip hotfix?

Yes — dispatch BCN-2041 to worker immediately. Also go ahead and brief trustalign on BCN-2043. For contentway on BCN-2044, hold off until trustalign confirms the alignment score definition — I don't want contentway drafting something inaccurate. worker and trustalign should run in parallel.

Dispatching worker and trustalign in parallel now. contentway held pending trustalign confirmation.

---

## 🚀 Dispatch Log — 2026-03-18 16:34 SAST

---

### worker → BCN-2041 · Tooltip Hotfix

```
TASK DISPATCH
Agent:   worker
Task ID: BCN-2041
Priority: P1
Dispatched: 2026-03-18 16:34 SAST

Instructions:
Locate all onboarding tooltip strings in the Dashboard MVP 
codebase. Search for references to the pre-MVP nav path for 
"Agent Activity". Update copy to reflect current panel location.

Scope: content strings only — no layout or logic changes.
Test: verify tooltips render correctly in staging before deploy.
Deadline: 2026-03-18 EOD SAST
Report back: completion status + list of files changed.
```

**Status:** ⏳ worker acknowledged · executing

---

### trustalign → BCN-2043 · Autonomy Boundary Audit

```
TASK DISPATCH
Agent:   trustalign
Task ID: BCN-2043  
Priority: P1
Dispatched: 2026-03-18 16:34 SAST

Instructions:
Audit all user-configured automations affected by the agent 
autonomy boundary tightening implemented this week.

Specific asks:
1. Enumerate workflows now blocked (include contentway-driven 
   content workflows — confirmed affected per support ticket).
2. For each blocked workflow, classify: (a) correctly blocked per 
   new policy, or (b) unintended collateral.
3. For category (b), recommend: policy carve-out OR user-facing 
   override mechanism.
4. Confirm the canonical definition of the alignment score 
   (currently 0.83) — specifically: is it per-account or global, 
   and what user actions influence it?
   → Required before contentway can draft BCN-2044 explainer.

Deadline: 2026-03-19 09:00 SAST
Report back: structured findings + alignment score definition.

Context: This is a course-correction item flagged in the 
2026-03-16 lessons learned retrospective. Treat with urgency.
```

**Status:** ⏳ trustalign acknowledged · executing

---

### contentway → BCN-2044
**Status:** 🔒 Held — pending trustalign alignment score confirmation (BCN-2043)
Will auto-brief contentway once trustalign delivers definition. Expected gate: **2026-03-19 09:00 SAST**.

---

### Active Task Board
| Task | Agent | Status | Due |
|---|---|---|---|
| BCN-2041 · Tooltip hotfix | worker | ⏳ In progress | 18 Mar EOD |
| BCN-2042 · Mobile session drops | worker | 🕐 Queued (post-2041) | 19 Mar 12:00 |
| BCN-2043 · Autonomy audit | trustalign | ⏳ In progress | 19 Mar 09:00 |
| BCN-2044 · Alignment explainer | contentway | 🔒 Held | 20 Mar 12:00 |
| BCN-2045 · Investor data flag | Alex | ⚑ Flagged | Pre-publish |

I'll surface worker's tooltip report as soon as it comes in. Do you want a consolidated status ping at EOD today covering BCN-2041 and any early findings from BCN-2043?

Yes, EOD ping sounds good. One more thing — the medium-priority batch had 12 UX feedback items on the Dashboard MVP layout. Before we close out this inbox review, can you pull out any recurring themes from those 12 items and tell me if anything there should be escalated given that we literally launched the Dashboard MVP this week? I want to know if there's a pattern we're missing.

Good call — worth checking before we close the session. Analysing the 12 medium-priority Dashboard MVP UX feedback items now.

---

## 🔍 Dashboard MVP — UX Feedback Theme Analysis
**Source:** 12 medium-priority in-app feedback items · 2026-03-16 to 2026-03-18

---

### Recurring Themes

**Theme 1 — Navigation density (5/12 items)**
Users describe the main nav as "overwhelming" or "hard to scan." Specific complaints: too many top-level items visible simultaneously, no clear visual hierarchy between primary and secondary actions. One user: *"I don't know where to look first."*
> **Pattern signal:** This is early-launch overwhelm, but 5/12 is a strong signal. Likely amplified by the fact that the MVP exposed more surface area than the previous UI.

**Theme 2 — Metric labelling ambiguity (4/12 items)**
Users unsure what specific dashboard metrics represent. Most cited: "Alignment Score", "Autonomy Index", and "Task Throughput (7d)." Overlap here with the **P1 alignment score transparency issue** (BCN-2044).
> **Pattern signal:** ⚠️ **Escalation candidate** — this theme directly reinforces the P1/P2 cluster already triaged. The labelling problem is broader than just the alignment score; it touches at least 3 metrics. The metric definition changes from earlier this week may have introduced labels users haven't seen before.

**Theme 3 — Mobile/tablet layout (2/12 items)**
Two users on iPad and Android tablet report that the dashboard panels don't reflow properly below 1024px. Panels stack in an unexpected order.
> **Pattern signal:** Low count, but worth watching. May compound the CodexAI mobile issue (BCN-2042).

**Theme 4 — Missing "last updated" timestamps (1/12 items)**
One user wants to know how stale the displayed data is. Asked for a visible refresh timestamp on each panel.
> **Pattern signal:** Isolated — low priority, good backlog item.

---

### Escalation Recommendation

**Yes — Theme 2 should be escalated.** Here's why:

The metric labelling ambiguity across 4/12 UX items, combined with the 3 alignment score transparency feedback items already triaged as P2 (BCN-2044), gives us **7 data points in 48 hours** pointing at the same root cause: the Dashboard MVP launched with metric labels that users cannot interpret.

This is consistent with the **metric definition changes** that went in earlier this week — if those changes altered how metrics are named or calculated, the dashboard inherited labels that don't match user mental models.

**Recommended action:** Broaden BCN-2044's scope. Instead of a single alignment score explainer, have contentway produce a **Dashboard Metrics Glossary** covering all labelled metrics. trustalign should provide definitions for alignment-related fields; the rest can come from the dashboard spec discussed in today's earlier session (`main_session_20260318_1107`).

---

### Updated BCN-2044 Scope Suggestion
> **Was:** 300–400 word alignment score explainer
> **Proposed:** Full Dashboard Metrics Glossary (alignment score + autonomy index + task throughput + any others surfaced in BCN-2043 audit)
> **Still gated on:** trustalign confirmation by 2026-03-19 09:00 SAST

Do you want me to update BCN-2044 with the expanded scope, or keep it narrow and create a separate BCN-2046 for the broader glossary?

---

**Inbox review session ready to close.** All 56 items accounted for, 5 tasks created, 2 agents active. I'll have the EOD ping to you by **18:30 SAST** with worker's tooltip hotfix result and any early trustalign findings.

Expand BCN-2044 scope — no need for a separate ticket, keep it consolidated. Update the task brief and adjust the deadline to 2026-03-20 17:00 SAST to give contentway enough runway for a proper glossary. Then close out the inbox review session.

Updating BCN-2044 and closing the session now.

---

**Updated:** 2026-03-18 16:41 SAST

| Field | Previous | Updated |
|---|---|---|
| Title | Alignment score explainer | **Dashboard Metrics Glossary** |
| Scope | Alignment score only (300–400w) | **All dashboard metrics** (alignment score, autonomy index, task throughput + any additional surfaced by BCN-2043 audit) |
| Assigned to | contentway | contentway *(unchanged)* |
| Gate | trustalign confirmation | trustalign confirmation *(unchanged)* |
| Deadline | 2026-03-20 12:00 SAST | **2026-03-20 17:00 SAST** |
| Source refs | 3 feedback items | 3 feedback items + 4 UX theme items (12-item batch) + dashboard spec from `main_session_20260318_1107` |

contentway will be briefed with the updated scope once trustalign clears the gate at 09:00 SAST tomorrow.

---

## 📋 Inbox Review Session — Closed
**Session ID:** inbox_review_20260318
**Closed:** 2026-03-18 16:41 SAST
**Domain:** customer_feedback
**Period reviewed:** 2026-03-16 00:00 → 2026-03-18 16:28 SAST

### Final Disposition — 56 Items
| Category | Count | Outcome |
|---|---|---|
| P1 tasks created | 3 | BCN-2041, BCN-2042, BCN-2043 |
| P2 tasks created | 2 | BCN-2044 (expanded), BCN-2045 (Alex flag) |
| Medium-priority themes analysed | 12 UX items | Folded into BCN-2044 scope |
| Low-priority / positive NPS | 16 | Logged, no action |
| Feature requests | 8 | Added to backlog |
| Billing queries | 4 | Routed to support |
| Churn closures | 3 | Routed to churn flow |

### Agents Active Post-Session
- **worker** → BCN-2041 (tooltip hotfix, EOD today) + BCN-2042 queued
- **trustalign** → BCN-2043 (autonomy audit, due 2026-03-19 09:00 SAST)
- **contentway** → BCN-2044 gated (glossary, due 2026-03-20 17:00 SAST)

### Course Correction Notes
This session surfaced three distinct course-correction items consistent with the Week 4 theme:
1. **Dashboard MVP launch gaps** — onboarding copy and metric labelling shipped without sufficient user context
2. **Autonomy tightening blowback** — policy change created unintended workflow breakage for power users
3. **Metric definition drift** — changes earlier this week introduced labels that don't match user mental models

All three are now tracked and assigned.

---

**EOD ping scheduled for 18:30 SAST.** I'll cover BCN-2041 completion status, BCN-2042 queue position, and any early signal from trustalign on BCN-2043. 👋
